channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tip toilet and system, 8th May
item.description:
Fly tip toilet and system

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Middle Way, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin full and rubbish dumped next it, 8th May
item.description:
The public bin by the bus stop is full and people have started to leave boxes etc behind it on the grass verge.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 8th May
item.description:
The fox was hit and killed by a speeding vehicle, it has been moved off the road, bagged and placed in the grass next to the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camden Park Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed frame flytipped, 8th May
item.description:
There are large pieces of a white metal bed frame dumped on the verge next to the vet's surgery on Parish Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal use of yellow parking restriction cones, 8th May
item.description:
They are using this parking restriction cones to reserve their personal parking, when the zone is a non restricted zone at any time.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Keverne Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned lorry, 8th May
item.description:
Has been there since 6th May. Number plates removed suggests it has been abandoned

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Electric Avenue, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in Alleyway, 8th May
item.description:
Lots of litter (cans, bottles etc) in alleyway between Church St and Painsthorpe Rd / Oldfield Rd. This is a recurring problem

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 141 Marmadon Road, 8th May
item.description:
Dumped furniture. Not sure how long it’s been here. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown brambles in access alley for rear of houses between 49 and 51 mill pace crayford, 8th May
item.description:
Overgrown weeds and brambles. No access can be gained at rear of houses

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crayford Way, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 181 Marmadon road, 8th May
item.description:
Drawer unit and other household items dumped. Been here since Thursday. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Japanese knotweed in CPP, 8th May
item.description:
Given the proximity to public land, nearby development activity, and ongoing utility/drainage works in the area, I wanted to ensure the relevant parties are aware so that any excavation or soil movement does not risk spreading the plant further. Thames Water has been having issues around here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westwood Hill, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping Council said they done it but still here, 8th May
item.description:
I recieved an email saying they come and collected the fly tipping and yet it’s still here. Its disappointing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There’s no sound from the traffic lights when it’s safe to cross., 8th May
item.description:
There’s no sound from the traffic lights when it’s safe to cross. The audible signal is essential for blind and visually impaired pedestrians.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 379-397, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 232 Marmadon Road, 8th May
item.description:
Dumped toilet. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 8th May
item.description:
Rubbish dumped at the intersection of Brooke and Reighton- started yesterday and more added today

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two problems on same road, 8th May
item.description:
Mattress’s and other household items dumped here yesterday and overnight. Black sacks of rubbish dumped next to, what appears to be, council road sweep bags waiting collection. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed frame, 8th May
item.description:
Bed frame and other rubbish dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Darling Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Load of furniture, 8th May
item.description:
Loads of furniture dumped on darling road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Darling Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: School Street on Clissold Road not being respected / enforced, 8th May
item.description:
Clissold Road School Street restrictions appear to no longer be effectively enforced during school drop-off hours. Over recent months there has been a clear increase in vehicles ignoring the restriction, creating dangerous conditions for children and famil
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clissold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1 black sack by a red painted gate., 8th May
item.description:
1 black sack by a red painted gate.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Park Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
